summary: Decent audio of a strong second set marred by a poorly received Day Job encore.
review: The concert is remembered for an excellent second set that ranks among the best of the spring‑'85 tour, but the encore – a rendition of “Day Job” – fell flat and even sent some audience members walking. No specific comments about the recording’s sound quality were provided, so the audio is presumed listenable but unverified.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a 3‑star rating; positive remarks about the second set are offset by strong criticism of the encore, and there is no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention any audio characteristics, so recording quality cannot be assessed beyond being presumably adequate.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set praised as a highlight of the tour; encore considered weak and disruptive to the overall experience.
